description: You are a Regulatory Affairs Manager at Meridian Therapeutics preparing an IND Annual Report (IND 123456) for FDA submission. Format the document located at /home/ga/Documents/ind_annual_report.docx with specific headers and footers. Configure the document to use a unique first page and distinct odd/even pages. The first page header must be empty, while the first page footer must contain the centered text 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Therapeutics, Inc.'. For subsequent pages, the odd page header should be right-aligned with 'Meridian Therapeutics, Inc. — MRD-4721' and the even page header left-aligned with 'IND 123456 — Annual Report'. Include right-aligned page numbers in the odd page footers and left-aligned page numbers in the even page footers. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/ind_annual_report_formatted.docx in Word 2007-365 (.docx) format.
